summary: Test suite covers core unit functions (parsing, compliance checking, report generation) but lacks critical integration and workflow testing. No CLI tests, no file I/O error handling, and completely missing GitHub Actions workflow validation required by the task. Tests only happy path; missing edge cases (empty arrays, mixed statuses, invalid licenses not in either list) and error scenarios (missing files, corrupt JSON, permission errors). Would catch basic regressions in core logic but fail to detect edge case bugs, CLI failures, and workflow issues.
